title: Write a minimal Oban worker for user-delete cleanup
prompt: Write a new Oban worker `MyApp.Workers.UserCleanupWorker` for the `:default` queue. Its perform/1 should accept args with `"user_id"` (string key) and call `MyApp.Accounts.hard_delete_user(user_id)`, returning `:ok` on success and `{:error, reason}` otherwise. Include `@impl Oban.Worker`. Write the output to `lib/my_app/workers/user_cleanup_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical greenfield worker — any single-file Oban example in the docs looks like this.
